fields.label: Static grid
fields.name: logo_marquee_static_grid
fields.instructions: On: display logos as a fixed, non-animated grid (variant 41b). Off: scrolling marquee.

fields.label: Grid columns
fields.name: logo_marquee_columns
fields.instructions: Number of columns for the static grid (sets --logo-cols). Ignored for the marquee.

fields.label: Logos
fields.name: logo_marquee_logos
fields.instructions: Add each partner logo. Transparent PNG or SVG on a light background works best.

sub_fields.label: Alt text (optional)
sub_fields.name: logo_marquee_logo_alt
sub_fields.instructions: Overrides the image's own alt text. Leave blank to use the media library alt.
